Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi

KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Nadege Ait-Ibrahim v. Ana Luiza Ferreira

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Coralie Dixon
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Coralie Dixon
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Coralie Dixon

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Coralie Dixon
Fighter Profile: Coralie Dixon
Fighter Profile: Coralie Dixon

Video.summary: How does one begin to return to their sport after an injury? After the Fight looks at the physical and mental struggles of fighters after a fight and how they begin to recover. Featuring Justin Grey
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Justin Grey
Video.title: After The Fight - Justin Grey

Image.alt: After The Fight - Justin Grey
After The Fight - Justin Grey
After The Fight - Justin Grey

Video.summary: Wisniewski’s development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 45 opens with a pro match between always threatening Zach Manywounds and Trenton Rowell, hungry for his first win. Following is Keegan ""the Condition"" Oliver vs. Hard Knocks newcomer, Vaz Lep. The main event of the evening is welterweight matchup between two exciting Hard Knocks veterans: Joel Powell vs. Adam Smith.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 1

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 45 continues with some hard hitting action in MMA! This episode features an amateur matchup between Joe Mapanda and debut Sheldon Williams. Following are pros Dusty Kramps vs. former Hard Knocks Amateur Champion, Devon Smith. Our final fight for the evening is a pro bout between dynamic fighters Justin Schmit and Vyron Phillips.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 2
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 2

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 2
Fight Vault - HK45 - Episode 2

Video.summary: One of the most experienced fighters in the series, Nick Thompson has the scars to prove it. Ansar Chalangov will be looking to come out hard for the Russians.

Video.title: Bodog Fight - Nick Thompson v. Ansar Chalangov

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Nick Thompson v. Ansar Chalangov

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Alex Martinez HK39
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Alex Martinez
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Alex Martinez

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Alex Martinez
Out of the Cage - Alex Martinez
Out of the Cage - Alex Martinez

Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Fransisco Azevendo as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo
Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo
Day in the Life of a Coach - Francisco Azevedo

Video.summary: No description.

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros
